description: This file defines API routes for managing 'notes' in a note-taking application built with FastAPI. It includes endpoints for creating, listing, retrieving, updating, deleting, and autosaving notes, with filtering and pagination support.

methods.name: create_note( note_data: schemas.NoteCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )
methods.description: Creates a new note for the authenticated user, validating folder ownership and assigning tags.

methods.name: list_notes( search: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Search in title and content"), folder_id: Optional[uuid.UUID] = Query(None, description="Filter by folder ID"), tag_id: Optional[uuid.UUID] = Query(None, description="Filter by tag ID"), is_pinned: Optional[bool] = Query(None, description="Filter by pinned status"), is_favorite: Optional[bool] = Query(None, description="Filter by favorite status"), is_archived: Optional[bool] = Query(False, description="Filter by archived status"), page: int = Query(1, ge=1, description="Page number"), page_size: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100, description="Items per page"), db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )
methods.description: Lists notes with filtering options such as search, folder, tags, pinned, favorite, and pagination.

methods.name: get_note( note_id: uuid.UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )
methods.description: Retrieves a specific note by ID for the authenticated user.

methods.name: update_note( note_id: uuid.UUID, note_data: schemas.NoteUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )
methods.description: Updates fields of a specific note, including validation of folder ownership and tag assignment.

methods.name: delete_note( note_id: uuid.UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )
methods.description: Deletes a specific note by ID for the authenticated user.

methods.name: autosave_note( note_id: uuid.UUID, note_data: schemas.NoteUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )
methods.description: Performs a lightweight update to save note content and title during editing sessions.

ctags.name: autosave_note
ctags.signature: ( note_id: uuid.UUID, note_data: schemas.NoteUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )

ctags.name: create_note
ctags.signature: ( note_data: schemas.NoteCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )

ctags.name: delete_note
ctags.signature: ( note_id: uuid.UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )

ctags.name: get_note
ctags.signature: ( note_id: uuid.UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )

ctags.name: list_notes
ctags.signature: ( search: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Search in title and content"), folder_id: Optional[uuid.UUID] = Query(None, description="Filter by folder ID"), tag_id: Optional[uuid.UUID] = Query(None, description="Filter by tag ID"), is_pinned: Optional[bool] = Query(None, description="Filter by pinned status"), is_favorite: Optional[bool] = Query(None, description="Filter by favorite status"), is_archived: Optional[bool] = Query(False, description="Filter by archived status"), page: int = Query(1, ge=1, description="Page number"), page_size: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100, description="Items per page"), db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )

ctags.name: update_note
ctags.signature: ( note_id: uuid.UUID, note_data: schemas.NoteUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )
